description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Native that runs on push and pull request events for files in the csharp directory and .github/workflows/native.yml. The workflow uses a matrix strategy to run on ubuntu-18.04, windows-2019, and macos-10.15. For each OS, it sets up NuGet, checks out the code, installs dependencies, configures Conan, and builds and packs a .NET project using dotnet build and nuget pack. The workflow then uploads the resulting NuGet packages as artifacts.
